title: StockEventLineDetailDto
description: A single transaction detail row - one stock card line item created by the event.

orderable.description: Resolved orderable (product) of the line item.

lot.description: Resolved lot of the line item, when present.

source.description: Resolved source facility or organization, for receive line items.

destination.description: Resolved destination facility or organization, for issue line items.

quantity.description: Quantity moved by the line item.

occurredDate.description: Occurred date of the line item (ISO date).

reason.description: Reason of the movement, when present.

stockOnHand.description: Stock on hand after the operation.

documentNumber.description: Document number of the originating event.
